pages.raw_text:
The greatest possible endeavOr
to secure the fifth annual cOnven-
ton of the Washington State HOr-
ticultural society is being put for
ward by the delegation of 90 Spo-
kane boosters who went to Walla
Walla in special car yesterday.
Today Mayor Moore telegraphed
his invitation to the convention to
meet here in January, 1909. Pres.
Goodall, of the chamber of COM
merce, sent letter to the cOnven-
ton extending the invitation of
the chamber and promising a most
hospitable reception. He calls the
attention of the convention to the
vast interests of fruit growers and
merchants centered in SpOkan
Through Sec. Levi Monroe the
Spokane Horticultural society also
extends its invitation, showing that
the transportation facilities and ho
tel accommodations make this city
the ideal convention place of the
Northwest.
